title: fagraea pauciflora
intro: Fagraea pauciflora, also known as the "White Gardenia" or "White Frangipani", is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Fagraea pauciflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
